case_title: JAMISON, LUCIE - LESSEE et al VS COREN, HARRY Z - LESSOR

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,999.00 FILED BY COREN, HARRY Z - LESSOR AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JAMISON, LUCIE - LESSEE LIBERMAN, LYDIA J - GUARANTOR OF LESSEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COREN, HARRY Z - LESSOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAMISON, LUCIE - LESSEE LIBERMAN, LYDIA J - GUARANTOR OF LESSEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COREN, HARRY Z - LESSOR $3,852.38 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,902.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,852.38 FILED BY JAMISON, LUCIE - LESSEE LIBERMAN, LYDIA J - GUARANTOR OF LESSEE AS TO DEFENDANT COREN, HARRY Z - LESSOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT COREN, HARRY Z - LESSOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT JAMISON, LUCIE - LESSEE LIBERMAN, LYDIA J - GUARANTOR OF LESSEE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO HARRY Z.COHEN RETURNED - NOT AT THIS ADDRESS;
